name: EGFRm-009
rationale: Quinazolin-4(3H)-one N3-benzyl variant (not 4-amine quinazoline) with N-CH2 linker to CF3-fluorobenzyl, exploiting Met790M pocket with flexible methylene reducing steric clash.

name: EGFRm-002
rationale: Pyrazolo[3,4-b]pyridine NH anchors to Met793 hinge while the CF3-pyrazole tail occupies Met790M gatekeeper pocket; morpholine-isoquinoline arm points toward solvent.

name: EGFR-TM-012
rationale: 2-Amino-6-aryl naphthyridine bearing fluorophenyl-pyridyl biaryl to occupy the extended hydrophobic groove of T790M and methoxycarbonylpiperazine for solubility.

name: EGFR-TM-014
rationale: Isoquinoline scaffold with pyridine amide pointing toward Asp855 and a fluorotoluene amine anchoring the gatekeeper pocket of T790M.

name: EGFR-TM-013
rationale: N-methyl benzimidazole bearing CF3-phenyl at C2 to fill the Met790M pocket and a pyridine carboxamide that reaches Asp855 in DFG-in conformation.

name: EGFRm-011
rationale: Carbazole-like pyrrolo[3,2-b]indole fused scaffold where the indole NH engages Met793, CF3-pyrazole arm fills Met790M, and pyridine amide with morpholine extends to solvent.

name: EGFR-TM-003
rationale: 2-Aryl-3H-quinoxalin-2-one scaffold where the lactam NH donates to Met793 hinge and the fluoroaniline amide explores a deep hydrophobic sub-pocket.

name: EGFRm-003
rationale: Pyrido[2,3-d]pyrimidinone scaffold with N-aryl bearing ortho-trifluoromethyl group directed at Met790 hydrophobic pocket and an acetylpiperazine for solvent front interactions.

name: EGFRm-003
rationale: 2-Aminopyrimidine fused with 4-pyridyl and tolyl groups positions the amine for Met793 H-bond while 4-pyridyl side chain engages Asp855 via H-bond; methylpiperazine improves bioavailability.

name: EGFRm-008
rationale: 2-Oxindole-5-carbonyl-methylpiperazine with C3-pyridyl substituent bridging to Asp855; oxindole NH H-bonds Met793 hinge while pyridyl N reaches DFG Asp855.

name: EGFR-TM-006
rationale: Pyrimido[4,5-b]indole scaffold presenting a CF3-fluoroaniline toward the gatekeeper pocket and methylpiperazine for front-pocket solubilization.

name: EGFR-TM-010
rationale: N-aryl pyrazolo[3,4-b]pyridine scaffold with amide linkage to CF3-phenyl targeting Met790M and morpholine-pyridine at C5 for front-pocket engagement.

name: EGFRm-014
rationale: 2-Aryl-1H-indazole scaffold where indazole NH engages Met793 hinge, C5-methylpiperazine occupies solvent front, and alpha-fluoropivaloyl amide adds bulk toward Met790 with metabolic stability.

name: EGFR-TM-002
rationale: Pyrido[2,3-d]pyrimidine scaffold with 2-amino substituent bearing a CF3-phenyl to probe the Met790M pocket and acetylpiperazine for solubilization.

name: EGFR-TM-015
rationale: Imidazo[1,2-a]pyridine fused bicycle where imidazole N donates to Met793 hinge and a CF3-aniline amide occupies the deep hydrophobic T790M gatekeeper cavity.

name: EGFRm-012
rationale: Imidazo[4,5-b]pyridine scaffold exploiting the bicyclic hinge-binding motif with C6 acetylpiperazine for front pocket and 2-fluoro-4-chloroaniline filling Met790 bulky space.

name: EGFRm-006
rationale: Uracil-based pyrimidinedione scaffold where two carbonyls can engage Met793 hinge and Asp855, with N-benzyl bearing ortho-fluorine directed toward Met790 and acetylpiperazine for solubility.

name: EGFRm-012
rationale: Imidazo[1,5-a]pyrazine scaffold with exocyclic amide to CF3-fluoroaniline for Met790M pocket occupancy and morpholine-decorated dihydro ring for solubility.

name: EGFRm-004
rationale: Pyrrolopyrimidine (7-azaindole-fused) hinge anchor with CF3-phenyl amine exploiting Met790 bulk selectivity and morpholine front pocket occupancy.

name: EGFRm-008
rationale: 2-Aryl-4-quinolinone scaffold where lactam NH and C4-carbonyl bind Met793 hinge, tert-butyl amine fills Met790 bulky pocket selectively, and morpholinyl phenyl occupies solvent front.

name: EGFRm-014
rationale: 2-Aryl-3H-imidazo[4,5-b]pyridin-3-one where lactam NH H-bonds Met793, C2-CF3-fluorophenyl exploits Met790M hydrophobic expansion, and hydroxyethyl-piperazine improves oral absorption.

name: EGFRm-007
rationale: Thieno[2,3-d]pyrimidine scaffold with C4-amino hinge donor, C2-morpholino solubilizer, and C6-(2-methyl-4-CF3-phenyl) group targeting Met790M gatekeeper.

name: EGFRm-007
rationale: Quinoline-based (not quinazoline) scaffold with dimethoxy substitution mimicking DFG-region contacts and piperidine-phenyl amine providing hinge binding and solubility.

name: EGFRm-010
rationale: Benzoxazinone-derived scaffold with N-aryl 2-fluoro-4-chloro substitution fitting Met790 enlarged pocket and morpholine for front pocket solubilization.

name: EGFRm-004
rationale: 4H-Pyrido[3,2-d][1,3]oxazin-4-one replaced by 3H-pyrrolo[2,3-d]pyrimidin-4(5H)-one hinge binder with CF3/Cl-disubstituted aniline exploiting Met790M steric expansion.

name: EGFRm-002
rationale: 1,6-Naphthyridine-3-carboxamide scaffold engages Met793 via amide NH/carbonyl, chloro/methoxy substitution orients into Met790 pocket, and methylpiperazine provides solubility.

name: EGFRm-009
rationale: Benzimidazole hinge scaffold with C5-benzamide directing methylpiperazine to solvent front and N-methyl group providing metabolic stability; benzimidazole N3 accepts H-bond from Met793 NH.
